title: Commerce funnels: fork a template, op:"equal" not "eq", live_mode to publish, product creation is Medusa-Admin-only
summary: Unified Funnels + Commerce P3 shipped commerce as a kind of Flow. Four hard-won rules: (1) create a commerce funnel by funnel_template_apply (NOT raw flow_create — the graph validator enforces OTO_REQUIRES_CHECKOUT + COMMERCE_NODE_LAYER); (2) edge condition operators are long-form — op:"eq" is not a recognised token and silently never matches (the 8.T1 production bug that 500'd then mis-routed buyers); (3) publish with live_mode=true, not a status flip; (4) check a sent order email via notification_log channel='email' status='sent', never mail_messages. Agents author the whole funnel EXCEPT product creation, which is the Medusa Admin UI today (the [8.6c] gap).
